form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last over 390m at this track beaten 6 lengths (22.54) behind Valletta Dash in a Grade 5 on April 1. Placed two back at Geelong. Unbeaten in two starts from this box. Key runner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last over 390m at this track beaten 6 lengths (22.54) behind Valletta Dash in a Grade 5 on April 1. Placed two back at Geelong. Unbeaten in two starts from this box. Key runner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Contacted on first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 22.82 over 400m at Geelong. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 22.82 over 400m at Geelong. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2.5 lengths fourth (22.32) over 390m at this track. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2.5 lengths fourth (22.32) over 390m at this track. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide on home turn and in home straight.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 5 over 435m at Sale in a Grade 5. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 5 over 435m at Sale in a Grade 5. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fifth (22.22) at Shepparton over 390m. Other runners look much more appealing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fifth (22.22) at Shepparton over 390m. Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.17) when seventh over 400m at Geelong in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (22.39) over 390m at this track. Wide draw here. Must be included.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.49) when seventh over 390m at this track in a Grade 5. Has three successes and three minors from 11 starts from box 8. Has ability and should be around the money.
